name: Goliath
overview: Three-part documentary series examining the historic life, career and impact of Wilt Chamberlain. One of the greatest and most misunderstood athletes of all time, Chamberlain changed the game of basketball, breaking records and racial barriers along the way while conforming to his own standards on and off the court. From his unparalleled athleticism to his pioneering achievements, Wilt Chamberlain was an icon who lived his life on an epic scale.

trailers.title: GOLIATH (2023) | Official Trailer | 3 Episode Series Streaming July 14 on Paramount + with SHOWTIME
